story_prompt: The clip transitions from a vibrant, yet subtly tense, nocturnal Hollywood of poolside relaxation and car conversations, into the bright daytime world of movie theaters, culminating with Sharon Tate joyfully witnessing her own performance on the big screen.

cues.audio_class: high-pitched emergency siren with oscillating tone
overlapping crowd panic and distant screaming
intense ice crystallization and sharp cracking SFX
heavy orchestral brass hit with long decay
dark synth pad with low-frequency movement
glass shattering and frozen debris impact
